description: One of the best-known images of 20th-century art, Edward Hopper's Nighthawks depicts an all-night diner where three customers, all lost in their own thoughts, have congregated. It’s unclear how or why the anonymous and uncommunicative night owls are there. While Hopper mostly avoided commenting on his intent for the work, he did share, “unconsciously, probably, I was painting the loneliness of a large city.”
title: Nighthawks
